title: toxicodendron radicans var. microcarpon
intro: Toxicodendron radicans var. microcarpon, also known as poison ivy, is a plant variety with a glossy leaf and urushiol sap, which causes an allergic reaction and skin irritation in many people. The medicinal properties of poison ivy include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can be used to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. The health benefits of poison ivy include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce stress levels. Poison ivy is typically prepared as a topical ointment or salve, which can be applied directly to the skin to treat skin irritations and reduce inflammation.
